summary: Iteration 58 - Frontend Architectural Upgrades Testing Complete. All 3 features verified: (1) Admin Analytics Dashboard with Recharts - all charts rendering correctly (AreaChart, LineChart, BarChart, PieChart), summary cards with data-testid attributes, period selector working (7/30/90/180/365 days); (2) React Lazy Loading - navigation between routes works without blank screens or errors; (3) i18n Internationalization - language switching works on Homepage, Login, Signup, Dashboard, and Navbar with EN/ES/FR translations.
critical_code_review_comments: Analytics Dashboard Recharts implementation is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all summary cards
Revenue Trends AreaChart with gradient fills for Stripe/Crypto payments renders correctly
User Growth LineChart with tooltip showing date, new users, and total users
Notarization Volume BarChart with Completed/Pending legend
Payment Distribution PieChart (donut style) with proper fallback for no data
Top Performing Notaries list with ranking badges
Document Types and Transaction Types progress bars render correctly
Period selector (7/30/90/180/365 days) refreshes data correctly
React.lazy loading implemented for 50+ pages with Suspense fallback PageLoader
i18n translations properly implemented using useTranslation hook across Login, Signup, Dashboard, Navbar
LanguageSwitcher component with EN/ES/FR options and localStorage persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three frontend architectural upgrades verified: (1) Admin Analytics Dashboard at /admin > Analytics tab - has summary cards (Total Revenue, New Users, Notarizations, Transactions) with data-testid attributes, Revenue Trends AreaChart, User Growth LineChart, Payment Distribution PieChart, Notarization Volume BarChart, Top Performing Notaries list, Document Types and Transaction Types progress bars, period selector (7/30/90/180/365 days). (2) React Lazy Loading - App.js uses React.lazy for 50+ pages with Suspense fallback PageLoader component. (3) i18n - translations in EN/ES/FR for nav, hero, auth, dashboard, common keys. LanguageSwitcher component on Navbar. Login page: welcome_back, email, password, forgot, sign_in, no_account. Signup page: create_account, full_name, email, password, confirm_password. Dashboard: title, logout.

translations: Forgot password?/Olvidaste la contrasena?/Mot de passe oublie?
Create Your Account/Crea Tu Cuenta/Creez Votre Compte
Confirm Password/Confirmar Contrasena/Confirmer le Mot de Passe
